designBrief.silhouette: bulky cargo body, visible hopper and frontal intake — must read as a hauler
forbiddenElements: anything that reads as a combat unit
designBrief.palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a green faction resource collector / hauler in an alien RTS. Material: alien composite shell, grown-metal surfaces. Palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: semi-organic, flowing conduits, chitinous panels, grav skirt glow. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: cannons, missile pods, anything that reads as a combat unit. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture depicting a deep moss-metal alien composite shell for a heavy resource hauler. The surface showcases intricate patterns of organically grown metal that flow and ripple, resembling hardened biological plates, interspersed with networks of slender, pulsating green and teal emissive conduits that trace paths across the hull. Integrated industrial details include subtly recessed hexagonal vents with a faint bioluminescent glow, irregular crystalline sensor nodes, and sections of heavy, organic-shaped plating displaying a weathered, almost corroded patina suggesting extreme durability. This texture must be rendered in a flat orthographic texture-sheet style, completely devoid of perspective, baked lighting, or any alphanumeric text.

A seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture for a robust green resource collector, featuring a composite alien shell of deep moss-metal with a woven, scaly appearance from intricate grown-metal strands. The hull is crisscrossed by prominent, sinuous green and teal emissive conduits that converge into glowing power-distribution nodes, suggesting dynamic energy flow. Imaginative alien industrial surface details include deeply recessed, multi-faceted intake ports, thick bio-mechanical structural ribs, and fused grown-metal areas forming heavy-duty attachment points or access panels, all rendered with a dull matte finish contrasting with patches of smoother, polished alien alloy and small, crystalline sensor protrusions. The output must be a flat orthographic texture-sheet, free from perspective distortion, baked lighting, or textual elements.

The output must be a flat orthographic texture-sheet, free from perspective distortion, baked lighting, or textual elements.
notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
